title: Disrupting deceptive uses of AI by covert influence operations

no significant audience increase due to our services.

title: Automating customer support agents
titleZh: 客户支持代理
summary: MavenAGI is a new software company for the AI era. They recently launched an AI customer service agent, built on the flexibility of GPT-4, which a number of companies like Tripadvisor, Clickup and Rho are already using to save time and better serve their customers.
summaryZh: MavenAGI是人工智能时代的新软件公司。他们最近推出了基于GPT-4灵活性的人工智能客户服务代理，许多公司如Tripadvisor、Clickup和Rho已经在使用该代理来节省时间和更好地为客户服务。

title: Enhancing news in ChatGPT with The Atlantic
titleZh: 与The Atlantic一起在ChatGPT中加强新闻
summary: The Atlantic is announcing a strategic content and product partnership with OpenAI, which positions The Atlantic as a premium news source within OpenAI. The Atlantic’s articles will be discoverable within OpenAI’s products, including ChatGPT, and as a partner, The Atlantic will help to shape how news is surfaced and pr
summaryZh: 《大西洋月刊》宣布与OpenAI建立战略内容和产品合作伙伴关系，将《大西洋月刊》定位为OpenAI的优质新闻来源。《大西洋月刊》的文章将在包括ChatGPT在内的OpenAI产品中被发现，作为合作伙伴，《大西洋月刊》将帮助塑造新闻的浮出水面和传播方式
highlights: The Atlantic is announcing a strategic content and product partnership with OpenAI, which positions The Atlantic as a premium news source within OpenAI.
The Atlantic’s articles will be discoverable within OpenAI’s products, including ChatGPT, and as a partner, The Atlantic will help to shape how news is surfaced and pr
highlightsZh: 《大西洋月刊》宣布与OpenAI建立战略内容和产品合作伙伴关系，将《大西洋月刊》定位为OpenAI的优质新闻来源。《大西洋月刊》的文章将在包括ChatGPT在内的OpenAI产品中被发现，作为合作伙伴，《大西洋月刊》将帮助塑造新闻的浮出水面和传播方式

title: How the voices for ChatGPT were chosen

title: Our approach to data and AI
titleZh: 我们的数据和人工智能方法
summary: Just over a year after launching ChatGPT, AI is changing how we live, work and learn. It’s also raised important conversations about data in the age of AI. More on our approach, a new Media Manager for creators and content owners, and where we’re headed.
summaryZh: 在推出ChatGPT一年多后，人工智能正在改变我们的生活、工作和学习方式。这也引发了关于人工智能时代数据的重要对话。详细了解我们的方法、为创作者和内容所有者推出的全新媒体管理工具以及我们的发展方向。
highlights: Just over a year after launching ChatGPT, AI is changing how we live, work and learn.
It’s also raised important conversations about data in the age of AI.
highlightsZh: 在推出ChatGPT一年多后，人工智能正在改变我们的生活、工作和学习方式。这也引发了关于人工智能时代数据的重要对话。详细了解我们的方法、为创作者和内容所有者推出的全新媒体管理工具以及我们的发展方向。

title: Understanding the source of what we see and hear online
titleZh: 了解我们在网上看到和听到的内容的来源
summary: Today we’re introducing new technology to help researchers identify content created by our tools and joining the Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity Steering Committee to promote industry standards.
summaryZh: 今天，我们将推出新技术，帮助研究人员识别由我们的工具创建的内容，并加入内容来源和真实性指导委员会联盟，以促进行业标准。
